tests.name: t1
tests.prompt: En ny bugg kom in: kartan laddar inte. Triagea den.
assertions: Mentions reproducing the bug before fixing it
Categorizes the report as bug, feature, or question
Assigns a priority level (P0 to P3 or similar)
Mentions assigning it or putting it in the backlog

tests.name: t2
tests.prompt: Produktionen är nere och David kan inte jobba. Vilken prioritet?
assertions: Classifies this as the highest priority (P0 or critical)
Advises dropping other work to address it
